revision.text: {{High-use}} '''{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}''' displays values stored in location map data [[Help:Module|modules]] such as [[Module:Location map/data/Belgium]]. These modules are used by [[Module:Location map]] to obtain values such as the file name and the border coordinates of each location map. == Usage == This module is automatically used as documentation for map data modules and should not normally be called manually. ====The name parameter==== The {{tl|Location map}} family of templates uses the value assigned to name to generate [[wp:alt|alt text]]. It is used to construct the sentence "label is located in name". Assign a value to that fits in the sentence. For example: : Chicago is located in the United States. So {{para|name|the United States}}. : Santo Domingo is located in the Dominican Republic. So {{para|name|the Dominican Republic}}. == See also == * [[Template:Location map/Info]], used for location map data [[Help:Template|templates]] such as "Template:Location map India" " * {{tl|Location map}} and [[Module:Location map]] {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Location map modules]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing modules
revision.text: {{High-use}} '''{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}''' displays values stored in location map data [[Help:Module|modules]] such as [[Module:Location map/data/Belgium]]. These modules are used by [[Module:Location map]] to obtain values such as the file name and the border coordinates of each location map. == Usage == This module is automatically used as documentation for map data modules and should not normally be called manually. ====The name parameter==== The {{tl|Location map}} family of templates uses the value assigned to name to generate [[wp:alt|alt text]]. It is used to construct the sentence "label is located in name". Assign a value to that fits in the sentence. For example: : Chicago is located in the United States. So {{para|name|the United States}}. : Santo Domingo is located in the Dominican Republic. So {{para|name|the Dominican Republic}}. == See also == * [[Template:Location map/Info]], used for location map data [[Help:Template|templates]] such as "Template:Location map India" " * {{tl|Location map}} and [[Module:Location map]] {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox|| [[Category:Location map modules]] }}
